name_cn:
🔥 Raffia Weave Brown/Gold
The newly released Oxalis woven shoulder bag is the perfect choice for vacation and play. Made with raffia woven into a mesh texture, the cutout style creates a lightweight, see-through visual effect while adding a touch of sophistication! Paired with a double-layer leather shoulder strap, the iconic gold metal hardware in the center becomes the highlight 👍
Model: 781289 [Original Leather]
Size: 37x40x3cm
